# Mass and acceleration relationship

## Short Teaching Summary
Mass and acceleration relationship: If you double the mass, you halve the acceleration (if the resultant force remains constant). Map connection: this idea links by example_of, requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.

## Difficulty
0.00

- Force and acceleration symbols (example_of)
- Newton's Second Law (requires)

- If you double the mass, you halve the acceleration (if the resultant force remains constant).
